# radosgw-admin (Full LLM Reference)

## Package Summary
`radosgw-admin` is a modern TypeScript client for Ceph RGW Admin Ops API. It signs requests using AWS SigV4, exposes module-based APIs, transforms response keys to camelCase, and maps HTTP errors into typed SDK errors.

## Runtime Requirements
- Node.js >= 18
- Ceph RGW endpoint with Admin Ops API enabled

## Client Constructor
`new RadosGWAdminClient(config: ClientConfig)`

### Config Fields
- `host: string` (required)
- `accessKey: string` (required)
- `secretKey: string` (required)
- `port?: number`
- `adminPath?: string` (default: `/admin`)
- `timeout?: number` (default: `10000`)
- `region?: string` (default: `us-east-1`)
- `debug?: boolean` (default: `false`)
- `maxRetries?: number` (default: `0`)
- `retryDelay?: number` (default: `200`)
- `insecure?: boolean` (default: `false`; disables TLS verification)

## Public Modules and Methods

### users
- `create(input: CreateUserInput): Promise<RGWUser>`
- `get(uid: string): Promise<RGWUser>`
- `modify(input: ModifyUserInput): Promise<RGWUser>`
- `delete(input: DeleteUserInput): Promise<void>`
- `list(): Promise<string[]>`
- `suspend(uid: string): Promise<RGWUser>`
- `enable(uid: string): Promise<RGWUser>`
- `getStats(input: GetUserStatsInput): Promise<RGWUserStats>`

### keys
- `generate(input: CreateKeyInput): Promise<RGWKey[]>`
- `revoke(input: DeleteKeyInput): Promise<void>`

### subusers
- `create(input: CreateSubuserInput): Promise<RGWSubuser[]>`
- `modify(input: ModifySubuserInput): Promise<RGWSubuser[]>`
- `remove(input: DeleteSubuserInput): Promise<void>`

### buckets
- `list(uid?: string): Promise<string[]>`
- `getInfo(bucket: string): Promise<RGWBucket>`
- `delete(input: DeleteBucketInput): Promise<void>`
- `transferOwnership(input: LinkBucketInput): Promise<void>`
- `removeOwnership(input: UnlinkBucketInput): Promise<void>`
- `verifyIndex(input: CheckBucketIndexInput): Promise<CheckBucketIndexResult>`

### quota
- `getUserQuota(uid: string): Promise<RGWQuota>`
- `setUserQuota(input: SetUserQuotaInput): Promise<void>`
- `enableUserQuota(uid: string): Promise<void>`
- `disableUserQuota(uid: string): Promise<void>`
- `getBucketQuota(uid: string): Promise<RGWQuota>`
- `setBucketQuota(input: SetBucketQuotaInput): Promise<void>`
- `enableBucketQuota(uid: string): Promise<void>`
- `disableBucketQuota(uid: string): Promise<void>`

### rateLimit
- `getUserLimit(uid: string): Promise<RGWRateLimit>`
- `setUserLimit(input: SetUserRateLimitInput): Promise<void>`
- `disableUserLimit(uid: string): Promise<void>`
- `getBucketLimit(bucket: string): Promise<RGWRateLimit>`
- `setBucketLimit(input: SetBucketRateLimitInput): Promise<void>`
- `disableBucketLimit(bucket: string): Promise<void>`
- `getGlobal(): Promise<RGWGlobalRateLimit>`
- `setGlobal(input: SetGlobalRateLimitInput): Promise<void>`

### usage
- `get(input?: GetUsageInput): Promise<RGWUsageReport>`
- `trim(input?: TrimUsageInput): Promise<void>`

### info
- `get(): Promise<RGWClusterInfo>`

## Behavioral Contracts
- Incoming payload keys are transformed to camelCase.
- Outgoing query keys are transformed to kebab-case.
- Empty-body success responses resolve as `undefined` for `Promise<void>` methods.
- Retries apply to retryable failures (network/timeouts/5xx) based on config.

## Error Classes and Mapping
- 400 -> `RGWValidationError`
- 403 -> `RGWAuthError`
- 404 -> `RGWNotFoundError`
- 409 -> `RGWConflictError`
- 5xx -> `RGWError`

## Destructive Operations
- `users.delete({ purgeData: true })`
- `buckets.delete({ purgeObjects: true })`
- `usage.trim({ removeAll: true })`

These can permanently delete data and should require explicit confirmation in higher-level applications.

## Common Usage Patterns

### Create and verify user
```ts
await rgw.users.create({ uid: 'alice', displayName: 'Alice' });
const user = await rgw.users.get('alice');
```

### Set user quota
```ts
await rgw.quota.setUserQuota({
  uid: 'alice',
  maxSize: '10G',
  maxObjects: 50000,
  enabled: true,
});
```

### Rotate keys
```ts
const keys = await rgw.keys.generate({ uid: 'alice' });
await rgw.keys.revoke({ accessKey: keys[0].accessKey });
```

## Repository References
- Entry point: `src/index.ts`
- Core client: `src/client.ts`
- Modules: `src/modules/*.ts`
- Types: `src/types/*.types.ts`
- Errors: `src/errors.ts`
- Tests: `tests/unit/*.test.ts`

## Canonical External Docs
- Ceph RGW Admin Ops: https://docs.ceph.com/en/latest/radosgw/adminops/
- Users: https://docs.ceph.com/en/latest/radosgw/adminops/user/
- Buckets: https://docs.ceph.com/en/latest/radosgw/adminops/bucket/
- Usage: https://docs.ceph.com/en/latest/radosgw/adminops/usage/
